reference: In this study PSAD was shown to have only a moderate additive value in decision making to omit biopsy for the individual patient with benign DRE and PSA between 4.0 and 10.0 ng/ml. Age-specific reference ranges of PSA can prevent unnecessary diagnostic procedures.
rag_answer: Prostate-specific antigen density alters decision making on biopsies.
llm_answer: Prostate-specific antigen density may alter decision making on biopsy.
